summary: Iteration 107: Tested new Date Quick Filter bar, Summary Bars, and Tour buttons on Sales and Expenses pages. All 13 backend tests passed. All 11 frontend UI tests passed. DateQuickFilter component shows pill-buttons (All, Today, Yesterday, This Week, This Month, Custom Range). Clicking 'Custom Range' displays date picker inputs. Summary bars show Grand Total/Cash/Bank/Online/Credit totals with colored cards. Tour buttons present on both pages.

issues: Hydration warnings: span elements inside tr/tbody/thead/th/td cause React hydration errors - cosmetic, non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: VirtualizedTable hydration warnings persist from iteration 106 - span elements wrapped inside table elements cause React hydration mismatches but don't block functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: DateQuickFilter uses data-testid attributes: date-quick-filter (container), date-filter-all, date-filter-today, date-filter-yesterday, date-filter-week, date-filter-month, date-filter-custom. Custom Range shows date-filter-custom-start and date-filter-custom-end inputs. Sales summary bar: data-testid='sales-summary-bar'. Expenses summary bar: data-testid='expenses-summary-bar'. Tour buttons: data-testid='sales-help-btn' and 'expenses-help-btn'.

1_sales_date_quick_filter_bar.details: DateQuickFilter component present with All, Today, Yesterday, This Week, This Month, Custom Range buttons. Clicking filters triggers API call with start_date/end_date params.

2_sales_this_month_filter.details: Clicking 'This Month' filters data to current month (Mar 2026). Shows 7 sales totaling SAR 2,300.

3_sales_today_filter.details: Today button present and clickable. API endpoint returns 200 with filtered results.

4_sales_all_filter_reset.details: Clicking 'All' resets to full dataset - 52 sales totaling SAR 63,362.47.

5_sales_custom_range_filter.details: Clicking 'Custom Range' shows date input fields. Selecting Feb 01-28, 2026 shows 45 sales in Feb.

6_expenses_date_quick_filter_bar.details: DateQuickFilter present on Expenses page with same button set.

7_expenses_this_month_filter.details: Clicking 'This Month' on Expenses filters data correctly.

8_sales_summary_bar.details: Grand Total summary bar shows Total (SAR 63,362.47 / 52 sales), Cash (SAR 24,342.59), Bank (SAR 26,099.90), Online (SAR 6,874.63), Credit (SAR 18,799.90) in colored cards.

9_expenses_summary_bar.details: Expenses summary bar shows Total Expenses (SAR 224,671.50 / 51 entries), Cash (SAR 184,785.50), Bank (SAR 34,633.00), Credit (SAR 5,253.00).

10_sales_tour_button.details: Tour button with HelpCircle icon present in Sales header at data-testid='sales-help-btn'.

11_expenses_tour_button.details: Tour button with HelpCircle icon present in Expenses header at data-testid='expenses-help-btn'.

12_backend_sales_date_filter.details: /api/sales?start_date=YYYY-MM-DD&end_date=YYYY-MM-DD returns 200 with correctly filtered results. Verified that all returned sales fall within the specified date range.

14_daily_grouped_view_preserved.details: Previous daily grouped view functionality still works on both Sales and Expenses. Expenses rows remain expandable.
